title: Cobblemon Trailblazer's Modpack
description: roleplaying  server. This is a cobblemon 1.7.1 server with mega showdown added.
body:
## Cobblemon Trailblazer's Modpack

Cobblemon Trailblazer's Modpack is the official client experience for the Trailblazer’s Roleplaying Server, built to deliver a smooth, immersive, and fully customized Cobblemon adventure for our community. This pack expands the base Cobblemon 1.7.1 experience with carefully selected performance mods, visual enhancements, UI improvements, and light gameplay extensions chosen specifically to support stable multiplayer roleplay. Every included mod has been tested for compatibility with Cobblemon 1.7.1 on Minecraft 1.21.1 to ensure the server and client stay synchronized, minimizing crashes and improving performance for players of all hardware levels.
